title: Microsoft Azure (for ages 13-17) Student Developer Pack Offer
description: Access to Microsoft Azure cloud services and learning resources for students aged 13-17 – no credit card required
eligibility: Verified students aged 13 or older who are approved for the GitHub Student Developer Pack; provider restrictions may also apply.
value: For students age 13-17. Free access to Azure App Services, Azure Functions, Notification Hubs, MySQL database from MySQL in-app, Application Insights, Azure DevOps.
